description: Skill switchboard rules for Microsoft Enterprise stack. Maps phase contexts to recommended skill invocations.

rules.when: User describes a new project or problem
rules.reason: Structure the discovery findings into a problem statement

rules.when: Problem statement exists and is approved
Phase 2 starts and planning/spec.md does not exist
planning/spec.md exists and planning/claude-plan.md does not
rules.reason: Run research, interview, plan generation, and external review (steps 1-15)

rules.when: planning/claude-plan.md exists and design-doc.md does not
rules.reason: Transform /deep-plan outputs into SDLC Phase 2 artifacts

rules.when: deep-plan-checkpoint.yaml exists and planning/sections/index.md does not
rules.reason: Generate TDD plan and section files from approved plan

rules.when: planning/sections/ has section files and section-plans/ is empty
rules.reason: Transform /deep-plan sections into SDLC section plan format
Execute section plans with TDD methodology

rules.when: Writing new code and quality.require_tdd is true

rules.reason: Review code for quality and maintainability

rules.when: Code touches auth, payments, or sensitive data
rules.reason: Profile requires security review; SOC 2 CC7.2 compliance

rules.when: Quality review passed, testing critical user flows
rules.reason: Generate and run end-to-end tests with Playwright
